The '''''Scarab''-class starfighter''' was a model of [[starfighter]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems Navy|naval forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] around the [[time]] of the [[Clone Wars]] against the [[Galactic Republic]]. Near the time of the war, ''Scarab''-class starfighters, alongside [[Vulture-class starfighter|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]], were transported aboard the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] of the [[Trade Federation]], whose cargo holds were utilized as [[hangar]]s and [[staging area]]s for Separatist forces following the corporation's alignment with the confederate government.<ref name="Rise" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Scarab''-class starfighters were first mentioned in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in ''[[Rise of the Separatists]]'', a [[2019]] supplement to [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' series of ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying]]'' products.<ref name="Rise" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, the [[Scarab-class starfighter/Legends|''Scarab''-class starfighter]] was introduced as the Scarab [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']], a [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] developed by [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Starfighter">[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]</ref> It later received its full name in [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]], a [[2007]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="Starships">[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]</ref>
